name: retrospective
description: Post-mortem audit of a completed Ralph project. Chains: codegap -> implementation gap -> plugin gap -> synthesis -> session explanations -> operational audit -> improvement TODO -> handover.

init_args.name: project-dir
init_args.description: Path to the Ralph project being retrospected. Defaults to cwd.

init_args.name: source-recipe
init_args.description: Recipe the project used: port or greenfield. Auto-detected from ralph/manifest.json if omitted.
